name: Advisor
text: +1 Action Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one of them. Discard that card and put the rest into your hand.

name: Baker
text: +1 Card +1 Action +1 Coffers | Setup: Each player gets +1 Coffers.

name: Butcher
text: +2 Coffers You may trash a card from your hand, to gain a card, costing up to (1) more than it per Coffers you spend.

name: Candlestick Maker
text: +1 Action +1 Buy +1 Coffers

name: Carnival
text: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one of each differently named card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Doctor
text: Name a card. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash the matches. Put the rest back in any order. | Overpay: Per (1) overpaid, look at the top card of your deck; trash it, discard it, or put it back.

name: Fairgrounds
text: Worth {2} per 5 differently named cards you have (round down).

name: Farmhands
text: +1 Card +2 Actions | When you gain this, you may set aside an Action or Treasure from your hand, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Farming Village
text: +2 Actions Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Treasure or Action card. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Farrier
text: +1 Card +1 Action +1 Buy | Overpay: +1 Card at the end of this turn per (1) overpaid.

name: Ferryman
text: +2 Cards +1 Action Discard a card. | Setup: Choose an unused Kingdom card pile costing (3) or (4). Gain one when you gain a Ferryman.

name: Footpad
text: +2 Coffers Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. | In games using this, when you gain a card in an Action phase, +1 Card.

name: Fortune Teller
text: +(2) Each other player reveals cards from the top of their deck until they reveal a Victory card or a Curse. They put it on top and discard the rest.

name: Hamlet
text: +1 Card +1 Action You may discard a card for +1 Action. You may discard a card for +1 Buy.

name: Harvest
text: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck, then discard them. +(1) per differently named card revealed.

name: Herald
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If its an Action, play it. | Overpay: Per (1) overpaid, put any card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Horse Traders
text: +1 Buy +(3) Discard 2 cards. | When another player plays an Attack card, you may first set this aside from your hand. If you do, then at the start of your next turn, +1 Card and return this to your hand.

name: Horn of Plenty
text: Gain a card costing up to (1) per differently named card you have in play (counting this). If its a Victory card, trash this.

name: Hunting Party
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal your hand. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a card that isnt a copy of one in your hand. Put it into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Infirmary
text: +1 Card You may trash a card from your hand. | Overpay: Play this once per (1) overpaid.

name: Jester
text: +(2) Each other player discards the top card of their deck. If its a Victory card they gain a Curse; otherwise they gain a copy of the discarded card or you do, your choice.

name: Journeyman
text: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards without that name. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Joust
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) You may set aside a Province from your hand to gain any Reward to your hand. Discard the Province in Cleanup.

name: Coronet
text: You may play a nonReward Action from your hand twice. You may play a nonReward Treasure from your hand twice. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Courser
text: Choose two different options: +2 Cards; +2 Actions; +(2); gain 4 Silvers. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Demesne
text: +2 Actions +2 Buys Gain a Gold. | Worth {1} per Gold you have. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Housecarl
text: +1 Card per differently named Action card you have in play. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Huge Turnip
text: +2 Coffers +(1) per Coffers you have. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Renown
text: +1 Buy This turn, cards cost (2) less. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Masterpiece
text: (1) | Overpay: Gain a Silver per (1) overpaid.

name: Menagerie
text: +1 Action Reveal your hand. If the revealed cards all have different names, +3 Cards. Otherwise, +1 Card.

name: Merchant Guild
text: +1 Buy +(1) At the end of your Buy phase this turn, +1 Coffers per card you gained in it.

name: Plaza
text: +1 Card +2 Actions You may discard a Treasure for +1 Coffers.

name: Remake
text: Do this twice: Trash a card from your hand, then gain a card costing exactly (1) more than it.

name: Shop
text: +1 Card +(1) You may play an Action card from your hand that you dont have a copy of in play.

name: Soothsayer
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse, and if they did, draws a card.

name: Stonemason
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it. | Overpay: Gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount overpaid.

name: Taxman
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of it (or reveals they cant). Gain a Treasure onto your deck costing up to (3) more than it.

name: Tournament
text: +1 Action Each player may reveal a Province from their hand. If you do, discard it and gain any Prize (from the Prize pile) or a Duchy, onto your deck. If noone else does, +1 Card and +(1).

name: Bag of Gold
text: +1 Action Gain a Gold onto your deck. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Diadem
text: (2) +(1) per unused Action you have (Action, not Action card). (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Followers
text: +2 Cards Gain an Estate. Each other player gains a Curse and discards down to 3 cards in hand. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Princess
text: +1 Buy This turn, cards cost (2) less. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Trusty Steed
text: Choose two: +2 Cards; or +2 Actions; or +(2); or gain 4 Silvers and put your deck into your discard pile. The choices must be different. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Young Witch
text: +2 Cards Discard 2 cards. Each other player gains a Curse unless they reveal a Bane from their hand. | Setup: Add an extra Kingdom card pile costing (2) or (3) to the Supply. Its cards are Banes.
